INTEL-ADMIN-01-hook.description: New TanStack Query hook with 4 live queries + realtime subscription
queries: metricsQuery — COUNT from market_signals, businesses, brands, account_subscriptions
signalsQuery — most recent 20 market_signals (title, signal_type, confidence, direction, updated_at, source_name, tier_visibility, status)
apiHealthQuery — api_registry (id, name, category, is_active, last_test_status, last_tested_at, last_test_latency_ms)
feedHealthQuery — data_feeds (id, name, is_enabled, last_fetched_at, last_error, signal_count)
INTEL-ADMIN-01-hook.realtime: supabase.channel on market_signals INSERT → invalidates admin-market-signals + admin-intelligence-metrics
INTEL-ADMIN-01-hook.isLive_contract: isLive=true when isSupabaseConfigured AND no errors AND data present

changes: Removed all static imports from adminIntelligence.ts (getPlatformMetrics, getAdminSignals, getWeeklyInsights)
LIVE/DEMO badge added to header (pulsing dot for LIVE, amber pill for DEMO)
KPI strip shows live counts: totalSignals, totalOperators, totalBrands, totalSubscriptions
Signal table renders live market_signals with direction icon, type badge, confidence, source_name
handleCreateSignal: live INSERT to market_signals (was placeholder toast)
DashboardSkeleton: skeleton shimmer on isLoading (NOT spinner)
API Health Panel: renders api_registry rows with pass/fail/timeout/untested icons
Feed Status Strip: renders data_feeds rows with error/ok icons, error message display
Empty states: illustrated fallback with LIVE vs offline context message

live_demo_detector.isLive_contract: PRESENT — useAdminIntelligence returns isLive based on isSupabaseConfigured + no errors + data present
live_demo_detector.badge_in_header: PRESENT — LiveDemoBadge component renders in page header
live_demo_detector.static_data_removed: PASS — getPlatformMetrics, getAdminSignals, getWeeklyInsights no longer imported

hub_shell_detector.empty_state: PRESENT — Activity icon + contextual message for signals, Server/Rss icons for API/feed panels
hub_shell_detector.realtime: PRESENT — Supabase channel on market_signals INSERT

notes: IntelligenceDashboard.tsx fully wired to live Supabase data. All 3 static adminIntelligence.ts function calls removed. Live CRUD (create/archive/delete), LIVE/DEMO badge, skeleton loading, empty states, API Health Panel, and Feed Status Strip all implemented. adminIntelligence.ts retained (other admin pages still reference getBrandAnalytics etc.) but IntelligenceDashboard no longer imports from it.
